feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Notification on SAP PM
entry.content:
Dear Frinds 

I make a user status PENDING for notification 

Is There is any way to cassify our pending reasons as a list  to be used for reporting such as 

1- Need Complete shutdown

2- need Partial shutdown

and so on

entry.title: FM to assign existing maintenance items to a dummy maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently starting to archive the maintenance plans, but there are bigger numbers of maintenance items that does not have a plan. By SAP's advice, a dummy plan should be assigned to these items so it can be archived.

I tried testing the existing FMs like to no avail:

  • MPLAN_READ
  • MPLAN_ITEM_READ
  • MPLAN_CHANGE
  • MPLAN_ITEM_CHANGE

I also tested MCH01, but its also not working.

entry.title: MRS, Work Manager & Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

Can anyone please explain usage of MRS, Work Manager & Asset Manager ? Are they same in S4 Hana ?

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Couldn't choose user status profile in Create Technical Object app
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to assign user status profile and set the status manually in Create/Change technical object. But the field is read only even though I have given the "Maintenance planner" role. In addition, maybe related with this business catalog, EAM - Technical Object (SAP_EAM_BC_TO_MC). I couldn't also see this catalog as well in the system. Please guide me how I can define the status profile. Please kindly see the attachment also.

 

Thanks for your advice.

 

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: What types of resources do you need for SAP EAM implementation?
entry.content:
What type of resources do you need for an EAM implementation?

1. Functional

2. Technical

entry.title: Display a picture of the equipment in IE02/IE03
entry.content:
Hello,

We need in the equipment master IE01, IE02 and IE03 to display a picture of the equipment. The picture should be displayed directly in a section of the screen without user intervention (no mouse clicks or other commands). For this purpose a document was created with CV01N and pictures where uploaded in it. The document was linked to the equipment. The first picture from the attached ones should be displayed.

We tried to make the settings like in the note 1821916 but the result is disappointing. The picture is displayed just in transaction CV02N or CV03N and is a very small thumbnail. No picture is displayed in IE02 or IE03.

Does any of you have an idea how to achieve what we need? Did somebody programed something similar?

Mihai

entry.title: Work Permit / WCM in SAP S4 Hana EAM
entry.content:
Hi All , 

Greetings !

Can you any one please throw some light on work permit /wcm process in SAP S4 Hana EAM module .

Thanking you .

Mohammed

entry.title: Resource scheduling app- Order operation is confirmed but in scheduling still showing not completed
entry.content:
Hi 

In Scheduling its showing "not completed" & " Completion in Addition"  even after order operation confirmation done. 

Scheduling is done between 18-08-2024 & 24-08-2024, Confirmation is done on 21-08-2024 , 

 

 S/4 HANA 2021 . 

Is this issue is due to finish end date 25-08-2024 ?

entry.title: User is not able to open the longtext word document in Work Order header
entry.content:
Hi Team,

User is not able to open the longtext word document in Work Order header. Once the user opens the longtext word document in the work order header the document will open and closes automatically and the screen will move to the text editor format. It is happening only for one user. Even we tried reinstalling the application but still facing the same issue.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: SAP PM Maintenance strategy creation
entry.content:
Hi,
Does anyone know where I can find the maintenance strategies in IMG? want to create one

entry.title: Manage Schedule [F3326] - Share schedule - Search help doesn't display Collaborator
entry.content:
Hi,

We're trying to share schedule in the app F3326 - Manage Schedule, but when we click on the Share Schedule icon and than select Maintenance Planners or Reviewer option, search help doesn't display any result. Doesn't matter if we enter our User ID, SAP User name or Full name. In each case dialog display any result.

On the Help Portal (Documentation) we found this Prerequisite:

Planners with whom you want to share a schedule must have assigned at least one work center to themselves.
Only then is the planner's name available in the Share Schedule dialog.

See link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/3da789436baf42c6a5692c4797aa00b0.html?q=collaborat
We checked it, and this is OK. I mean assigned "My Work Centers" in our user profiles.

We checked all setting described in the Implementation Information from Fiori library for this app also and everything looks OK.

Can anybody help us with this issue?

entry.title: SAP PM MRO Inventory Spares
entry.content:
How do we create a MRO Inventory for our equipment and maintenance workers? We have inventory for production and it is fully implemented with everything. I thought we could create a storage location and configure it for an MRP that will not report to costing or any financing. Making it able for us to purchase on our own and create materials,  and do our own inventory and cycle counts.

I am told I cannot create any SLoc without it being wholly part of production and reporting cost.

entry.title: /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_P and /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_Q Graph
entry.content:
Hi Team,

What is Capacity Integral and Used Capacity in both the /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_P and /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_Q graphs. Please can you explain me with the examples.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: IA38 Mass change not working
entry.content:
Hello,

we want to use IA38 to change the purchase group for some task list operations. We mark the lines (see screenshot1.jpg) and then we select "Goto -> Mass change -> Change task list operation". But we got an information that task list is not current, update table (see screenshot2.jpg).

Has anyone any idea why this mass transaction does not work?

Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: How to Open different types of maintenance notes in batch with different types of priority?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I use SAP ECC 750 with some restrictions in my company (my user don't have all transactions screens or can't use scripting). Some transactions are personalized and the creation of maintenance notes is individual, using the IW21 screen. Is there a common screen or personalized to mass create different types of notes with different texts and different priorities, or can use a database or some sheets?

We are in a SAP integration project with Microsoft PowerApps and this ecosystem would have a long and prosperous life if this possibility existed.

TL;DR: How to Open different types of maintenance notes in batch with different types of priority.

entry.title: PM orders on the basis of completion of each orders.
entry.content:
Hi,

In maintenance plan, there are many orders in the call number, and all completed on different dates. User wanted to generate next orders on the basis of completion date of each order. Not on the basis of actual variance of the call number. Is there any possibility?

entry.title: EAM planning bucket
entry.content:
Setup EAM I have followed BPE 4HI and create planning bucket for Technical object..

  • Duration 7 days
  • recurrence - weekly
  • recures every week
  • buckets in advance 5
  • assign technical object 1234

When orders are ready for schedle and run the Maintenance backlog overview and I select the Bucket for that Technincal obejct and look forward in advance 5 I see nothing. the order is set for this week.

I have no clue what is wrong. THis seems like strange way to manage what orders are ready to be schedule

 

Any insight into why nothig shows would be helpful. Or a better way to see if parts are on order with PO and it cant be scheduled it. I guess I expected a better view.

entry.title: User name for last changer of maintenance plan header is invalid ( API Message MPLAN 106 )
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts, 

When running a custom tcode for maintenance plan mass change error

"User name for last changer of maintenance plan header is invalid ( API Message MPLAN 106 )"

How to resolve this issue

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit - Measurement Document - EAM/PM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Guru's,

I am trying to create a Conversion Specification Document to migrate Measurement Documents from ECC to S4HANA.

But the issue here is in the current Data Migration Cockpit Measurement Document upload template doesn't have the fields for "Total counter reading" and "Total counter reading set externally and these fields are necessary for the client.

How can I proceed with this? 

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: In Resource scheduling app - Operation cannot be scheduled automatically
entry.content:
Hi
One of Work center capacity utilization maintained 85%, while scheduling not able to achieve 100% scheduling of work center and giving "9XXXXXXXXX/0010: Operation cannot be scheduled automatically"

How to achieve 100% scheduling ? due operations how to schedule in same.


Another work center even maintained utilization as 85% 110% scheduling achieved, 
Scheduling date are same in both case and capacity Hrs and operating time are same. 

Please suggest  

Note: We are using S/4 HANA 2021 ,
